name: Gingerbread Men Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:45
Combine first 3 ingredients in a small saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until shortening melts.
Combine flour, baking soda, salt, ginger, and cinnamon; add the shortening mixture, stirring well.
Stir in molasses; chill for 8 hours.
Divide dough into half; store one portion in the refrigerator.
Roll dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch on a lightly floured surface. Cut with a 5-inch gingerbread man cutter and place on lightly greased cookie sheets.
Press currants into dough for eyes, nose, and mouth.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
Cool cookies for 2 minutes on the sheets; remove to wire racks and cool completely.
(Cookies will be soft.)
Repeat procedure with remaining dough.
Store in airtight containers. Yield: about 4 dozen.
